query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "qwen-agentworld: language world models for general agents" linguistics
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it investigates the core mechanism of "language world models for general agents" by explicitly testing inference-time search algorithms for multi-step planning and environmental feedback in web agents, which is the fundamental operational domain of the user's referenced "Qwen-AgentWorld" work. Although it does not focus on "linguistics" as a primary variable, it provides the canonical empirical baseline for agent performance and reasoning capabilities
